title: Add integration tests for protected routes
description: The auth middleware and unit tests exist at src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts and auth-middleware.test.ts. The withAuth HOC at src/auth/withAuth.ts is already applied to 13+ API routes. However, the integration tests from the task's test strategy are missing: (1) protected route rejects unauthenticated request with 401, (2) protected route accepts authenticated request and returns data. These require actual HTTP-level tests against Next.js route handlers.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts - factory pattern with UserStore, SessionStore, JwtService dependencies injected
src/app/api/health/route.test.ts - direct handler invocation pattern for route unit tests
src/app/api/health/route.ts - unprotected route using withAuth pattern
